eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Mason, WA; at 04:23 PM ON MAY 20, 2026 Effective until 05:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Washington State Patrol on behalf of Shelton Police Department has cancelled the Amber Alert for Kyson Moen. The victim has been located.
